info.title: PBX Platform API
info.description: Multi-tenant virtual PBX control plane API. Tenant-scoped routes require Bearer JWT and X-Tenant-Id header.

apiKeyAuth.description: Tenant API key: Authorization: Bearer pbx_live_<prefix>_<secret>

ExtensionCreateResponse.description: SIP credential secret is returned only on create. Read/list/get responses never include plaintext secrets.

secret.description: Plaintext SIP password — only present on create

RateLimitedResponse.description: 429 with Retry-After header when rate limited

IntegrationConnection.description: Platform integration connection — secrets never returned on read
